Mojiworld looks best in landscape. Turn your device sideways for the full-screen experience — you can always dismiss this for portrait play.

v0.4.0
—

🌐 Multiplayer

Disconnected
Players in room
How it works. Run the server from server/ (npm start). Connect to ws://localhost:8080 for a local LAN party, or deploy the server to Fly.io / Railway / any VPS for a public game. Everyone on the same room name sees each other. Combat / loot are still per-player for now — this is presence + chat. Co-op bonus: if a party member is within ~400 px of your kill on the same map, you get +50% XP.
In-world chat: press Enter to type, Esc to cancel. Max 60 characters per bubble. Works offline — bubbles float above your own character.
